traits.t: Leif can freeze the opponent once per combo with certain Skills.

pros.p: Powerful ranged game with long normals and projectiles.
Freeze is powerful way to end combos into a mixup.
Can combo from normal throws anywhere for free.

cons.c: Normals are slow, high commitment, and hit specific ranges.
Lacks good conversions from far away without resources.

flows.f: Uncharged Ice Shard (236A) can be chained into Icefall (214A), and vice versa.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
Icicly swipe.
Far range for a light normal, but also one of the slowest.
Whiffs on crouchers unless they're tall (like Leif himself).

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ B }}
normals.description:
Throws two icicles forward.
Leif's farthest-reaching normal.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ C }}
normals.description: Spikes icicles forward. Just a bit less range than {{ n5 }}{{ B }}.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
A low kick.
Less range than {{ n5 }}{{ A }}, but faster.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Leif pounds the ground, creating a large icicle.
Has slow startup, making it good for frametraps, but can be slightly difficult to use.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
Kicks an icicle forwards.
Has the longest horizontal range of Leif’s jump normals.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Attacks all around with a spread of icicles.
Charged version Launches the opponent high with significant hitstun.

commands.name: {{ n3 }}{{ B }}
commands.description: Leif hovers upside down and kicks at the opponent twice, advancing slightly with each kick.

commands.name: {{ n6 }}{{ B }}
commands.description: Steps forward with a spinning overhead kick.

commands.name: {{ n3 }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Kicks up a tall icicle.
Good anti-air move, but not much horizontal range.
Freezes on counterhit.

commands.name: {{ d }}{{ B }}
commands.description: Slides across the ground on an icicle.

commands.name: {{ d }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Leif jumps forward and spikes out icicles in all directions.
Slow startup, high hitstun.

throws.name: Ground throw
throws.description: Leif grabs the opponent and spikes up icicles from below them.

throws.name: Air throw
throws.input: {{ d4 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} or {{ d6 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} while airborne
throws.description: Leif grabs the opponent and freezes them, dropping them to the ground.

skills.name: Frost
skills.description:
Leif creates a frosty cloud that lingers for a few seconds.
If you pass an Ice Shard ({{ d236 }}{{ A }}) or -- ({{ d214 }}{{ A }}) through it, the move will power up, consuming the cloud.

skills.name: Glacial Gem
skills.description: Leif creates an icy sigil that detonates after a few seconds. Can nullify a 2-hit projectile. If you hit it with an Ice Shard ({{ d236 }}{{ A }}) or q ({{ d214 }}{{ A }}), it will detonate instantly.

skills.name: Ice Shard
skills.description:
Leif creates an icicle that launches straight forwards, or diagonally downwards in the air.
Using the air version bounces you backwards.
When passed through a Frost ({{ S }}) cloud, the icicle will be fortified and gain an extra hit of unscaled damage that increases hitstun and blockstun. Fortified icicles also travel faster and redirect to the opponent's location.
Charged version is a large stationary icicle that hits three times and is dash- and jump- cancelable.
Used mostly on oki or as a greedy pressure reset.
Fortified charged version is still stationary, but increases in range with an additional final hit that deals extra hitstun/blockstun.
In Active Flow, you can chain uncharged {{ n236 }}{{ A }} into {{ n214 }}{{ A }} by pressing {{ d4 }}{{ A }}.

skills.name: {{ n236 }}{{ B }}
skills.description:
Leif stomps on the ground and creates an icy splash. Safe, but minus on block.
Air version Wallbounces if you're close to the corner.
Freezes on counterhit.
The air version has no extra recovery if you land after Leif stomps, making it very plus with good timing.
Charged version can only be done on the ground, and sends ice shards across the entire screen that hit low.

skills.name: Glacial Ascend
skills.description:
Leif spikes up a large icicle about half-screen away.
Good as a pre-emptive anti-air, or as a long-range poke.
It doesn't go past the edge of the screen in the corner.

skills.name: Icefall
skills.description:
Leif shoots an icicle diagonally downwards. When counterhitting an aerial opponent, it groundbounces.
When charged, the icicle ricochets off the ground. The groundbounce is very helpful in combos, or from converting off stray hits in neutral. The charged version can only be done on the ground.
When passed through a Frost ({{ S }}) cloud, the icicle will be fortified and gain an extra hit of unscaled damage that increases hitstun and blockstun.
A fortified charged Icefall will redirect to the opponent's location.
In the air, it acts similarly to Ice Shard ({{ j }}{{ n236 }}{{ A }}), but pauses your aerial momentum briefly rather than bouncing back. The icicle launches on a delay.
In Active Flow, you can chain uncharged {{ n214 }}{{ A }} into {{ n236 }}{{ A }} by pressing {{ d6 }}{{ A }}.

skills.name: {{ n236 }}{{ C }}
skills.description:
Leif leaps forward and tries to grab the opponent. Only connects on aerial and standing opponents.
On connect, he'll slam them into the ground, launching them back up with an icicle.
Can only combo afterwards on raw connect, or with Chain Cancel.
If you Chain Cancel during the startup, you'll keep the momentum.

skills.name: Bubble Shield
skills.description:
Leif encloses himself in a barrier, knocking nearby opponents away. Hits on both sides, but not much horizontal or vertical range.
You can also use it to reflect projectiles.
It can be useful as an more expensive, but higher-damage combo ender.

exs.name: <b>Frozen Drill<b/>
exs.description:
Leif creates a tall icicle, hitting the opponent multiple times quickly. The final hit keeps the opponent in the air a long time, allowing you to switch sides.
If powered up with a Frost cloud ({{ S }}), the final hit will no longer be an Ender, allowing followup combos.

exs.name: {{ n214 }}{{ A }}+{{ B }}
exs.description: Leif extends an icicle all the way across the screen. On hit, the opponent will get splintered by more shards of ice once they hit the corner.

exs.name: Hailstorm
exs.description:
Leif creates a small hailstorm in an area around himself. Plus on block.
If powered up with a Frost cloud ({{ S }}), it will guard crush, giving extra frame-advantage.

exs.name: Ice Rain
exs.description:
Leif marks the opponent. After a short period of time, several icicles rapidly rain down from the sky at the opponent's location.
The marker goes away if Leif is hit before the icicles start falling, but they won't stop if Leif is hit after they start raining.

exs.name: Frozen Drill
exs.description: Leif spikes up an icy drill from below the opponent, hitting them multiple times before ending in one final strike.
